scenarioName: Account Compromise Chain for Critical Cloud Admin
description: Combination of weak identity controls leading to compromise of critical cloud admin accounts.

scenarioName: Mass Data Exposure via Cloud Storage and Reporting
description: Misconfigured cloud storage and broad reporting access allow large-scale data exfiltration.

scenarioName: Critical Service Compromise via Vulnerability and Poor Segmentation
description: Critical external service is compromised due to unpatched vulnerabilities, weak segmentation and limited logging.
